input.memoryNote: You convinced an entire Airbnb house full of strangers to celebrate your birthday with us by simply announcing it was your birthday and producing a full birthday cake from your backpack. Nobody questioned where the cake came from. You always have a cake.

meta.tiktokHook: POV: your best friend produced a full birthday cake from her backpack in a stranger's Airbnb and somehow convinced everyone to celebrate. Nobody asked where the cake came from.
